toolAvailability: Shared-test fake tool only; not a runtime user-facing tool.

observedApprovalBoundaries.policyEvaluation: Observed before approval evaluation for both executions.
observedApprovalBoundaries.approvalRequirementCheck: Descriptor ApprovalRequirement=Required caused BridgeToolExecutor to invoke IToolExecutionApprovalService.
observedApprovalBoundaries.approvedPath: Approval decision Approved allowed ApprovalRequiredBridgeTool.ExecuteAsync to run.
observedApprovalBoundaries.deniedPath: Approval decision Denied returned structured ApprovalDenied and did not invoke the tool.
observedApprovalBoundaries.auditEnvelopeEmission: InMemoryAuditSink captured one BridgeAuditEnvelope for each terminal outcome.
observedApprovalBoundaries.redactionBoundary: Approval reason metadata and warning logs were redacted through ISecurityRedactor.
observedApprovalBoundaries.correlationPreservation: RequestId and OperationId matched across policy, approval, logs, audit, and result metadata.

captureMethod: Durable transcript reconstructed from the shared-test fake approval-required path in BridgeToolInfrastructureTests: Executor_invokes_approval_service_for_approval_required_tool and Executor_denied_approval_prevents_tool_execution_and_emits_audit_event.
validationScope: Shared bridge tool execution boundary only. No runtime tool was added, no UI prompt was added, no proposal approval redesign was performed, and MCP transport was not exercised.
